articles.title: Project Glasswing: Tech giants unite to fix AI
articles.description: Anthropic and partners unveil Project Glasswing as AI models begin surpassing humans in vulnerability detection.
articles.content:
A coalition of major technology firms has launched a new initiative to confront a rapidly escalating cybersecurity threat driven by advanced artificial intelligence.
The effort, called Project Glasswing, brings together companies including Amazon Web... [2763 chars]

articles.title: AI will affect more than half of all U.S. jobs, analysis finds
articles.description: Artificial intelligence is more likely to change the nature of work than to supplant masses of workers, according to researchers.
articles.content:
Artificial intelligence will dramatically change the nature of work, but stop short of replacing most employees, according to a recent analysis.
Over the next three years, AI will "reshape" between 50% and 55% of U.S. jobs, Boston Consulting Group re... [2378 chars]

articles.title: How a Catholic Sister Podcast Became a TikTok Sensation
articles.description: No, they're not AI and they're not nuns. Meet the viral sisters from 'Dominican Sisters Open Mic' podcast that's become a TikTok sensation
articles.content:
Somewhere in a Michigan recording studio, a group of Dominican sisters are making a podcast. Millions of people on TikTok have found it. The sisters themselves? They have almost no idea.

articles.title: "Video games are cooked": Publisher head says "it doesn't matter" how many of us hate gen AI, Pandora's box has opened and "it's gonna get used now"
articles.description: Kinda gives me the ick to look at gen AI art
articles.content: Mike Rose, founder of indie publisher No More Robots, which is perhaps best known for the likes of Yes, Your Grace and Descenders, likens the spread of generative AI use in games to the opening of Pandora's box. Simply put, we ain't getting the lid b... [3186 chars]

articles.title: Mumbai Cyber Cell Arrests Jalna Youth For AI-Generated Defamatory Video Targeting CM Devendra Fadnavis & Ajit Pawar Plane Crash
articles.description: Police arrested Jalna resident Uddhav Bhagwan Kapse for allegedly creating an AI-generated video defaming CM Devendra Fadnavis and misrepresenting a plane crash involving Ajit Pawar. The video, which gained 1.5 lakh views, was later deleted. Kapse was remanded to custody till April 10 as police probe possible links and support behind the content.
articles.content: Mumbai: The Cyber Cell of the Western Regional Division Police has arrested a youth from Jalna for allegedly creating and circulating an objectionable video on social media that defamed Maharashtra's Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis and spread mislea... [2382 chars]

articles.title: Anthropic Says Its Latest AI Model Is Too Powerful to Be Released
articles.description: Anthropic said Claude Mythos is too good at hacking and that's why you won't be able to use it anytime soon.
articles.content:
Anthropic said on Tuesday that it has halted the broader release of its newest AI model, Mythos, due to concerns that it is too good at finding "high-severity vulnerabilities" in major operating systems and web browsers.
"Claude Mythos Preview's larg... [3314 chars]

articles.title: Crypto Is Having Its AI Chatbot Moment; You’re Missing It
articles.description: Cryptocurrency networks (blockchains) are now quietly emerging as the future plumbing of the entire global financial system.
articles.content: Sorry you missed crypto’s chat GPT moment. It’s not your fault. Even if you were trying to pay attention between conversations with your favorite AI, you didn’t see it because it was invisible. The sudden arrival of conversational AI was hard to miss... [4555 chars]
